gratitude_journal_streak.label: Daily Gratitude Journal Streak
gratitude_journal_streak.hypothesis: SOFT — apps like 5-Minute Journal exist but niche streak-only gratitude trackers may be BO

therapy_homework_streak.label: Daily Therapy / CBT Homework Streak
therapy_homework_streak.hypothesis: BO — therapist-assigned homework tracking is underserved, 10M+ therapy subreddit

sobriety_streak_niche.label: Sobriety / Sober Streak Counter (non-AA)
sobriety_streak_niche.hypothesis: SOFT — r/stopdrinking huge, apps exist but none dominate non-AA secular market

screen_time_habit.label: Daily Screen Time Reduction Habit
screen_time_habit.hypothesis: BO — digital wellness is massive trend, existing apps are OS-level not habit-streak

bedtime_routine_streak.label: Daily Bedtime Routine / Sleep Hygiene Streak
bedtime_routine_streak.hypothesis: BO — insomnia + sleep optimization trend huge, no dedicated routine streak app

parenting_read_aloud.label: Daily Read-Aloud to Kids Streak
parenting_read_aloud.hypothesis: BO — parenting community 18M+, pediatric reading habit trackers nearly absent on App Store

no_spend_day_streak.label: No-Spend Day Streak / Budget Habit
no_spend_day_streak.hypothesis: BO — frugal subreddits 40M+ combined, no-spend challenge apps nearly zero

savings_deposit_streak.label: Daily Savings Deposit / Transfer Streak
savings_deposit_streak.hypothesis: BO — r/personalfinance 30.9M confirmed, no dedicated daily-savings-action streak app

call_family_streak.label: Daily Call / Text Family Member Streak
call_family_streak.hypothesis: BO — loneliness epidemic, no dedicated family connection streak app found

random_acts_kindness.label: Daily Random Acts of Kindness Streak
random_acts_kindness.hypothesis: BO — 1M+ RAK community, prosocial behavior apps essentially zero on App Store

cold_shower_streak.label: Daily Cold Shower / Cold Exposure Streak
cold_shower_streak.hypothesis: SOFT — Wim Hof app exists but not a streak-focused habit tracker

sunlight_morning_habit.label: Daily Morning Sunlight Exposure Habit
sunlight_morning_habit.hypothesis: BO — Huberman Lab audience massive, no dedicated morning sunlight streak app
